guard.py.name: command-guard
guard.py.description: PreToolUse guard: blocks rm -rf /, force-push, DROP TABLE and other destructive commands before execution.

session_logger.py.name: session-logger
session_logger.py.description: Stop hook: appends a session entry (date, approx tokens) to activity/changelog.jsonl.

HOOKS.md.name: auto-format
HOOKS.md.description: PostToolUse hook wiring: Prettier/black on every edit — zero tokens on formatting (see settings-hooks.json).
